_comment: Pure-Python packages NOT in the upstream Pyodide distribution that Chickadee needs in the one canonical Pyodide (Public/pyodide). scripts/add-pyodide-extras.py downloads each pinned wheel, verifies its sha256, drops it into Public/pyodide, and injects a pyodide-lock.json entry so loadPyodide({packages:[...]}) can load it. Re-run by scripts/setup-vendor.sh after every re-vendor so a Pyodide bump never silently drops these. All wheels must be py3/py2.py3-none-any (ABI-independent) so they survive a Pyodide ABI bump unchanged.
